caption: A woman with long blonde hair tied back in a low ponytail is positioned in profile against a plain, neutral-colored wall. She is wearing a black shirt and a light blue surgical face mask. Throughout the sequence, she remains relatively still, facing toward the right of the frame. At the bottom of the scene, a magenta banner spans the width of the image. On the left side of the banner, a circular emblem contains the text "Day 5". The center of the banner displays the words "Difficult Conversations" in a white, sans-serif font, and the right side features a logo consisting of vertical lines and the text "Sim Week". As the sequence progresses, the woman maintains her posture and expression, with only slight shifts in her head position.
